generation_provenance.provenance_notes: HTML approval proof preserves the kept shuttle-stack ImageGen Variant A still, ambient stack, matte, rail, and captions while replacing the overlapping music bed with a music-only intro, unchanged voiceover body, and music-only outro.

source_plate_registration.repair: The selected Variant A source plate, foreground matte, and ambient canvas share fixed 1920x1080 stage coordinates.
source_plate_registration.source_plate_geometry: inset 0, width 1920px, height 1080px, object-fit fill, transform none
source_plate_registration.reason: Depth correctness is prioritized for aircraft/dust masking on the new approved source plate.

additive_effects.integration_policy: additive only; preserve Ambient C aircraft, dust, matte, rail, captions, and scrubber behavior

tightened_foreground_matte_context.human_review_note: Route samples are centerline checks; visual review should still confirm no aircraft glow appears in front of tower, shuttle stack, pad deck, or foreground crew/lights.

particle_context.reason: Human review saw particles but rejected the effect for this direction; may revisit later.

sections.title: First Smoke
sections.summary: The first visible warning appears, then vanishes.

sections.title: Routine Promise
sections.summary: The Shuttle promise changed what delay meant.

sections.title: Pressure System
sections.summary: Uncertainty becomes the flexible pressure point.

sections.title: O-ring Record
sections.summary: A known joint problem becomes operating history.

sections.title: Warning Translation
sections.summary: Evidence keeps moving while its stopping power weakens.

sections.title: Launch-Night Standard
sections.summary: The room changes what proof has to prove.

sections.title: Reversal and Flight
sections.summary: The same evidence returns as launch approval.

sections.title: What Challenger Shows
sections.summary: A failed seal reveals a repeatable system pattern.

reviewer_notes:
['Created after reviewer tightened the prior shuttle-stack Variant A proof for missing intro/bed/outro music.', 'Runtime stays 00:21:29.131; narration starts at 0s; captions, rail timing, chapter timing, visual layers, matte, ambient aircraft/dust, and beacon pulse are unchanged.', 'This packet uses one conservative review mix rather than A/B/C music variants.', 'Successor created after human review said intro and outro music should not overlap the voiceover.']
Human requested matte tightening before any further MP4 render or YouTube publish-readiness step. Successor: /Users/mike/Episodes_CascadeEffects/Ep1_Challenger/production/longform_v3_20_25min/youtube/rough_assembly/living_cover_shuttle_stack_reference_variant_a_full_runtime_hybrid_attention_rewrite_music_only_intro_outro_outro_screen_literal_rail_captions_tight_matte_html_approval_proof_20260512T152522Z
Tightened matte successor: review aircraft/dust depth against shuttle stack, service tower, pad deck, foreground crew/lights. No MP4 was rendered for this gate.
Human review 2026-05-12: dust quantity is too high and dust motion is too slow; create successor with moderate dust pacing tune (46 motes, 2.25x movement speed).
Dust pacing successor 20260512T172711Z: reduced deterministic dust to 46 motes and scaled existing drift speed by 2.25x; no audio, captions, matte, aircraft, outro, or MP4 changes.
Human review 2026-05-12: intro music hard-cuts when VO starts; create successor with brief 2s music fade tail under VO from 9.601451s to 11.601451s.

ambient_living_layer.aircraft_behavior: distant navigation point lights only, varied vectors, multiple left-sky continuations beyond the tower, masked behind foreground structures
ambient_living_layer.dust_behavior: reduced deterministic localized motes with faster irregular motion, clipped to open sky/light falloff areas by precise foreground matte

foreground_occlusion_matte.semantics: white/alpha visible means ambient may render in open sky; black/transparent means tower, shuttle, launch pad, crawlerway, crew, ground, lights, and foreground details occlude ambient effects
foreground_occlusion_matte.generation_method: deterministic flood-fill from top/side dark sky candidates on the selected Variant A source plate, with bottom foreground excluded; no ImageGen, repaint, crop, or backplate regeneration
masked_out_regions: practical light bulbs and local halos
foreground_occlusion_matte.explicit_non_mask_region: right rail; the matte is only a backplate foreground occlusion matte

prohibitions: no generated or repainted backplate media

generation_provenance.provenance_notes: Fresh deterministic matte and ambient proof over kept shuttle-stack Variant A; no visible source image regeneration.

ambient_living_layer.integration_policy: preserve Ambient C behavior exactly; add beacon pulse in the same ambient canvas before masked aircraft/dust pass
ambient_living_layer.audio_control_behavior: native audio control remains outside fixed canvas; direct click primes and plays audio for review; debug APIs expose load/play state

registered_foreground_matte_context.root_cause: Previous precise matte packets rendered the visible source plate with CSS scale/drift while evaluating the matte and ambient canvas in raw 1920x1080 coordinates.
registered_foreground_matte_context.repair: The source plate, foreground matte, and ambient canvas now share the same fixed 1920x1080 stage coordinates.
registered_foreground_matte_context.source_plate_geometry: inset 0, width 1920px, height 1080px, object-fit fill, transform none
registered_foreground_matte_context.reason: Depth correctness is prioritized over source-art drift until the foreground matte is human-reviewed as correct.

tower_beacon_pulse_context.purpose: Subtle procedural obstruction-beacon micro-life added to the existing Ambient C proof without replacing aircraft or dust.
tower_beacon_pulse_context.coordinate_space: fixed 1920x1080 stage coordinates, same registered coordinate system as source plate and ambient canvas
tower_beacon_pulse_context.behavior: soft eased fade in, brief peak, slower fade out, low resting glow, slight deterministic irregularity
tower_beacon_pulse_context.integration_policy: additive procedural pass only; do not replace Ambient C aircraft, localized dust, foreground matte, rail, captions, or scrubber behavior
tower_beacon_pulse_context.raster_artifact_policy: no edited/generated raster, no sprite asset, no source image filter, no CSS plate change; procedural canvas radial gradients only

left_sky_aircraft_audio_repair_context.repair: Multiple aircraft routes now continue visibly into open sky left of tower after foreground matte occlusion/reappearance.
left_sky_aircraft_audio_repair_context.audio_repair: Review audio is primed on direct control interaction with muted=false and volume=1, exposes debug/play APIs, and is QA-checked for currentTime advancement plus Web Audio analyser signal.
